[[File:Bo-pe_sommo.jpg|thumb|left|Bo-Pe Sommo's starship is shot down.]]
'''Bo-Pe Sommo''' was a hapless [[Realspace/Legends|space]] trader with business on the [[Byss Run/Legends|Byss Run]]. He bought a clearance code from fellow [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] [[Shug Ninx]] and made the run along with Ninx; however, unbeknownst to him, the code was illegal. While Shug Ninx was able to get through [[Byss Security]] with his illegal code, Sommo did not, and his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed by one of Byss's [[Gauntlet Scanner Station]]s.

==Behind the scenes==
Sommo's existence is only depicted in a single panel of the third issue of ''Dark Empire II''. The reader never actually sees him or his ship prior to its destruction.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] {{1stm}}
